title: Scotland–Spain–Portugal–Italy Travel Boost as Ryanair Expands at Glasgow Prestwick Airport for Summer 2026

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Scotland–Spain–Portugal–Italy Travel Boost as Ryanair Expands at Glasgow Prestwick Airport for Summer 2026. Ryanair launches Summer 2026 at Glasgow Prestwick with 10 routes to Spain, Portugal, and Italy, boosting Scotland's Mediterranean...
